name_cn:
Authentic Grade
The "SERPENTI CABOCHON" series mini shoulder bag features a charming large-scale graphic pattern and bold metallic details, radiating the brilliance of the SERPENTI world with its exquisite, practical design and modern style.
This bag is equipped with an adjustable and detachable leather shoulder strap, serving as a handbag or clutch to achieve versatile styling suitable for day and night.
Small size, with one storage compartment, one internal zip pocket, and one internal open pocket. Engraved BVLGARI brand logo on the inner metal plate.
Model: 291223
Dimensions: 27×18×11 cm
